name: INPINITY Resource — Mysterium
description: Mysterium is an extremely rare resource in INPINITY Online. Only Diamond blocks can produce it. Used for unique Infinite City wonders and top-tier crafting.

farmingV2.claim: Claimed via claimResources. Until claimed, resources are stored on the block.

risk.pirates: Stored resources can be stolen by pirate attacks (up to 9% per day) until claimed.
